<!--
Optional dedication page. Delete this entire HTML comment wrapper
(the surrounding `<!- -` and `- ->` markers — without the spaces) to
enable. Edit the text inside to suit. Renders for both PDF (centered,
own page via \cleardoublepage) and HTML (centered block above the
preface).

::: {.content-visible when-format="pdf"}
\cleardoublepage
\thispagestyle{empty}
\null\vfill
\begin{center}
{\Large To Someone Important (1900 -- 2000),\par}
\vspace{2ex}
{\large a short tribute, quotation, or description\par}
\end{center}
\vfill\null
:::

::: {.content-visible when-format="html"}
::: {.qkit-dedication style="text-align: center; margin: 4em 0;"}
*To Someone Important (1900 -- 2000),*

*a short tribute, quotation, or description*
:::
:::
-->

# Preface {.unnumbered .unlisted}

A short preface introducing the book. Explain the motivation, the intended
audience, the prerequisites, and how the book is organized.

## How to read this book {.unnumbered .unlisted}

Conventions used in the book: code in monospace, package names in bold,
references in citation form. Replace this section with whatever conventions
your book follows.

## Acknowledgments {.unnumbered .unlisted}

Acknowledgments go here.

```{=tex}
\mainmatter
\pagenumbering{arabic}
```
